channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Down 14%, Is Tesla a Good Buy Now?
item.description: In a challenging EV market, Tesla's emerging energy division could be its strongest growth engine.

item.title: Is What Trillionaire Elon Musk Said Enough of a Reason to Buy Tesla Stock?
item.description: The founder and CEO's words are music to the market's ears.

item.title: One of Tesla’s biggest threats just got banned in the U.S.
item.description: In a major development that will inevitably strengthen Tesla’s dominant position in the American EV market, Polestar has been effectively banned from selling new vehicles in the United States, starting with the 2027 model year. The U.S. Department of Commerce denied Polestar authorization under t...

item.title: Is Tesla’s (TSLA) Home-Battery Supercoalition Quietly Rewriting Its Core Energy Narrative?
item.description: Earlier this week, Sunrun, Renew Home and Tesla Energy Operations announced a framework to aggregate more than 16 gigawatts of flexible residential energy capacity across the US into turnkey grid solutions for utilities and hyperscale data centers. This coalition aims to operate what could be the...

item.title: TSLA Stock Dips — Tesla Gears Up To Ramp European Production To 7,500 Vehicles Per Week Amid FSD Push
item.description: André Thierig, Senior Director of Manufacturing at Giga Berlin, said in a post on X that the German gigafactory will increase weekly vehicle production to 7,500 units starting in October.

item.title: Mag 7 Stocks Shed Nearly $3 Trillion This Month
item.description: A massive rotation at the expense of big AI spenders has the Magnificent Seven on pace to shed $3 trillion this month. Collectively, Tesla, Apple, Microsoft, Meta Platforms, Nvidia, Amazon.com, and Alphabet have lost $2.99 trillion in market cap so far in June, according to Dow Jones Market Data....

item.title: Tesla faces lawsuit from family of victim killed in Texas home crash
item.description: Tesla investors have placed a lot of eggs in the company's autonomous driving basket to justify its 338x trailing twelve-month price-to-earnings ratio. The S&P 500 currently has a TTMPE ratio of 32, according to Multpl. The company doubled down on its autonomous driving ambitions earlier this ...

item.title: Tesla Stock Price Prediction: Why The EV Maker Is Sitting Right at Fair Value
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) has been one of 2026’s most-debated stocks, swinging between SpaceX-merger fever and valuation skepticism. After running the numbers, our 24/7 Wall St. price target lands almost exactly where shares trade today, with a modest single-digit upside that earns a buy rating but sto...

item.title: Micron overtakes Meta, Tesla in market value amid AI-driven demand
item.description: STORY: :: Micron Micron Technology briefly blew past the market value of Big Tech brethren Meta and Tesla for the first time ever on Thursday. Micron's stock surge came a day after the memory chip maker - and major supplier to AI powerhouse Nvidia - forecast quarterly profit and revenue well abov...

item.title: 601W’s bad week gets worse with $43M foreclosure on Tesla-leased Chicago building
item.description: Washington Capital's Paul Ravetta and 601W Companies' David Blumberg with 717 S. Desplaines Street (Getty, LinkedIn, Washington Capital, Google Maps)You know it’s a bad week when a $43 million Chicago foreclosure lawsuit is the least of your problems. That’s exactly the position New York-based co...

item.title: Polestar barred from US over the Chinese connected vehicle rule, a dangerous precedent
item.description: Polestar is pulling new vehicles out of the US market starting with model year 2027 after the Commerce Department declined to grant it authorization under the Connected Vehicle Rule, the company confirmed today. The decision effectively ends new-car sales in the US for the Geely-owned Swedish EV ...

item.title: Teslas Will Now Deploy Their Airbags Before Crashes Happen Thanks To Cameras
item.description: The manufacturer says its cameras can now help the restraint system react sooner when a collision becomes unavoidable.

item.title: Tesla, Waymo Get Robotaxi Rule Boost
item.description: Proposal could help fully autonomous vehicle developers.

item.title: Tesla and Waymo duel in the robotaxi race — but the company spending the most builds no cars at all
item.description: Uber is quietly writing $500 million checks to lock in robotaxis as Waymo threatens to leave it behind.

item.title: Tesla Bulls Push Wild Robotaxi Theory, But Gary Black Says The SpaceX Merger Talk Makes No Sense At All
item.description: Investor Gary Black of The Future Fund LLC dismissed arguments made by bullish supporters of Tesla Inc., who opined that Elon Musk was deliberately slowing down the EV giant’s Robotaxi ramp to induce a merger with Space Exploration Technologies Corp.....

item.title: Tesla Cybercab stands to gain from new Trump autonomy rules
item.description: Tesla Cybercab stands to gain from new rules that the Trump Administration is aiming to enforce on autonomous vehicles. On Thursday, NHTSA, under the Trump Administration’s U.S. Department of Transportation, commenced rulemaking on the Federal Motor Vehicle Safety Standards (FMVSS).

item.title: SpaceX vs. Tesla: Which Will Grow More Over the Next 12 Months?
item.description: SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX) and Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) sit on opposite sides of the same Elon Musk story. SpaceX debuted on June 12 and carries a $2.13 trillion market cap. Tesla closed Q1 FY2026 with $22.39B in revenue.

item.title: Tesla's Optimus Could Become A Bigger Memory Customer Than Its Cars, If Micron Is Right
item.description: Tesla Inc.‘s Optimus humanoid robot has largely been viewed as an artificial intelligence and robotics play. But according to Micron Technology Inc., it could also become a major driver of demand for one of AI’s most overlooked components: memory. During...

item.title: Elon Musk Just Lost His Trillionaire Status, as SpaceX and Tesla Stocks Plummet. Should Investors Buy the Dip?
item.description: He's still the wealthiest person in the world by a landslide.

item.title: Did Micron's Market Cap Surpass That Of Tesla’s And Meta’s Today? A Blowout Q3 Report Holds The Answers
item.description: Micron’s stunning third-quarter results sparked a rally that briefly pushed its market capitalization to nearly $1.42 trillion.

item.title: You Already Own Tesla. Should You Add SpaceX to Your Portfolio, Too?
item.description: SpaceX may be the leader in space, but its recent stock volatility highlights the growing gap between a world-class business and a valuation investors are willing to support.

item.title: Tesla to hire 1,000 more Giga Berlin workers as Europe demand returns
item.description: Tesla plans to hire another 1,000 workers at its Gigafactory outside Berlin, the automaker confirmed Thursday, as it moves to ramp production at its only European plant. The hiring push comes as Tesla targets 7,500 vehicles per week at the Grünheide factory starting in October — a sharp accelerat...

item.title: Why Does Sweden Want to Block Tesla's FSD Expansion in Europe?
item.description: Sweden is urging the EU to reject TSLA's wider FSD rollout, citing automated speeding concerns as regulators weigh a June 30 vote.

item.title: Micron overtakes Meta, Tesla in market value amid relentless AI infrastructure demand
item.description: Micron Technology edged past the market valuation ‌of Meta Platforms and briefly ‌Tesla's for the first time on Thursday, ​after the memory chipmaker's solid forecast helped extend its AI-driven ascent. The company's shares were last up 18.4% ‌at $1,236, giving ⁠it a market capitalization of $1.3...

item.title: Tesla plans production boost at Giga Berlin following rebound in Europe
item.description: Tesla plans to boost production at its Gigafactory Berlin plant in Germany following a sharp rebound in sales and demand in Europe after a softer 2025. The plans put Tesla in a better position to compete with strengthening companies in Europe and potentially other markets; demand indicators show ...

item.title: SpaceX (SPCX) Is Down 31% From Its High and Is Now Borrowing $25 Billion. Should Investors Be Worried?
item.description: If I were a shareholder in SpaceX, I'd be worried.

item.title: Sunrun Stock Explodes After Landmark Tesla Energy Deal
item.description: Sunrun Lands Major Tesla Catalyst as AI Data Centers Hunt for Power

item.title: Nasdaq extends sell-off as Micron overtakes Meta and Tesla by market cap
item.description: The PCE price index rose to a 4.1% annual rate for May

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Lands 16 Gigawatt U.S. Power Plant Deal And 25 Gigawatt Hour Europe Pact
item.description: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA), Sunrun, and Renew Home agreed to aggregate over 16 gigawatts of flexible residential energy capacity in the U.S. into what they describe as the largest distributed power plant. The U.S.

item.title: Elon Musk’s Tesla Under Fresh Scrutiny As Texas Crash Victim’s Family Files Wrongful-Death Lawsuit, NTSB Opens Probe
item.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is facing fresh legal and regulatory challenges following the National Transportation Safety Board (NTSB) announcement that it will examine the fatal Texas crash that took place last week involving a Model 3 sedan. NTSB Announces Probe According to a report by Reuters on ...

item.title: SPCX, TSLA Eye Weekly Losses: Elon Musk Sheds Trillionaire Crown As SpaceX’s Red-Hot IPO Rally Loses Steam
item.description: Investors are now watching Starlink's growth and Starship's R&D spending ahead of its first public earnings report.

item.title: A bunch of cars caught fire at a Tesla dealership today.
item.description: Several cars caught fire at the Tesla dealership in Owings Mills, MD today. submitted by /u/Sweaty-Moment-3385 [link] [comments]

item.title: Elon Musk loses trillionaire status after tech sell-off erases billions from fortune
item.description: Elon Musk's net worth has dropped below $1 trillion after SpaceX and Tesla shares fell during a broader tech sell-off, less than two weeks after the milestone.

item.title: SpaceX’s 32% crash may force Musk into radical move
item.description: Less than two weeks ago, SpaceX became the most valuable company ever to go public, raising $75 billion at a valuation north of $1.7 trillion and closing its debut session up 19%, according to CNBC. On June 22, SpaceX posted its worst single-day loss as a public company, plunging 16% to close at ...

item.title: Is Tesla Stock Better Than SpaceX? The Answer Might Surprise You.
item.description: SpaceX went public June 12 and already is more valuable than Tesla.

item.title: Megablock lands in Germany!
item.description: Recap of Mega Munich where our team hosted customers for technical deep dives on everything from fire safety, to grid compliance, and controls https://x.com/Tesla_Megapack/status/2069819685533601834?s=20 submitted by /u/rcnfive [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla driver passes trooper at nearly 80 mph, while allegedly asleep behind the wheel
item.description: submitted by /u/kleverrboy [link] [comments]

item.title: Stock Market Today, June 24: Sunrun Jumps After Announcing Deal With Tesla and Renew Home for 16 Gigawatts of Flexible Power
item.description: On June 24, 2026, Sunrun's new partnership drew investor focus to virtual power plant economics and future growth potential.

item.title: Why a fatal crash threatens Tesla’s stock
item.description: Tesla’s (TSLA) latest federal safety probe isn't a routine crash investigation. It’s a test of one of the greatest assumptions still baked into Tesla’s stock: that the company can turn driver-assistance software into a business considerably more valuable than regular car sales. For years, Tesla h...

item.title: Analyst makes a bold call on Bitcoin over Tesla and SpaceX
item.description: Crypto analyst InvestAnswers has thrown cold water on the panic gripping the Bitcoin (BTC) market, telling investors that the leading cryptocurrency is sitting on signs of a late-stage bear market bottom, and that its biggest move may be just one round number away. In a podcast, the analyst ...

item.title: Global Battery Storage Boom Is A Boon for Tesla
item.description: Tesla signed a multi-year agreement with NatPower to deploy more than 25 GWh of battery storage across Europe.

item.title: Sunrun (RUN) Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
item.description: Shares of residential solar energy company Sunrun (NASDAQ:RUN) jumped 19.2% in the afternoon session after the company announced a partnership with Tesla and Renew Home to provide more than 16 gigawatts of flexible energy capacity to utilities and large-scale data centers, often called hyperscalers.

item.title: OPEN CEO Takes $1 Salary As $741 Million Tesla-Style Pay Package Bets On A Housing Market Turnaround
item.description: Opendoor Technologies Inc. CEO Kaz Nejatian is working for a base salary of just $1 in cash, yet he has secured a staggering $741 million accounting valuation in pure stock-based “alignment”—an aggressive, milestone-driven compensation package that mirrors the legendary moonshot incentive structu...

item.title: This ETF Is Feasting on SpaceX Stock. It's Also a Play on a Possible Tesla Acquisition.
item.description: The Baron First Principles ETF has quickly asserted itself as the primary ETF proxy on SpaceX stock.

item.title: RUN Stock Pops as Sunrun Teams Up With Tesla, Renew Home on Data Centers
item.description: Sunrun stock is rallying on a new deal with Tesla and Renew Home. But is there any further upside left in RUN shares? Let’s find out!

item.title: Tesla sued over fatal Texas crash, uses 'pedal misapplication' defense — update
Elon Musk loses trillionaire status as SpaceX and Tesla stock drops
item.description: Falling shares push tech mogul back down to billionaire ranks after SpaceX IPO made him world’s first trillionaire

item.title: Sunrun Shares Rise on Deal With Tesla, Renew Home to Supply Power for Data Centers
item.description: Sunrun (RUN) shares jumped 13% in Wednesday trading after the company agreed with Tesla (TSLA) and R

item.title: Tesla, Sunrun team up on 16 GW virtual power plant for data centers
item.description: Sunrun, Tesla, and Renew Home announced an agreement today to aggregate more than 16 gigawatts of home batteries, thermostats, and other devices into what they say would be the largest distributed power plant in the country, aimed squarely at the surging electricity demand from data centers. The ...

item.title: Better Buy: SpaceX or the "Magnificent Seven"?
item.description: SpaceX's market cap is in the same trillion-dollar-plus range as those tech giants, but does it have similar strengths to them as a business?
